summary: Completed testing of taxi application with Mapbox integration. Backend APIs fully functional with 100% test pass rate. Mapbox integration working correctly - map loads with dark theme, navigation controls visible. Session management issues identified in frontend affecting user persistence.

integration_issues.issue: User sessions not persisting properly - after successful login to passenger/driver dashboard, user gets redirected back to login page intermittently

design_issues.issue: Mapbox Geocoding API autocomplete suggestions not always visible in UI despite API calls being made

passed_tests: Backend authentication (passenger & driver login/register - 100% success rate)
All ride workflow APIs (create, estimate, accept, start, complete, cancel)
Driver availability and vehicle management APIs
Payment integration and ride history APIs
Driver dashboard loads correctly with earnings, ratings, and notifications
Mapbox GL JS integration - map loads with dark-v11 theme correctly
Mapbox navigation controls (zoom in/out) visible and functional
Map displays Paris location correctly with proper dark styling
Notification system working - real-time ride updates (accepted, started, completed)
Booking interface present with pickup/destination fields and estimate button

success_percentage.frontend: 80% - Core Mapbox features working, minor session persistence issues

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend authentication session persistence issue where users get redirected to login after successful dashboard access. Investigate AuthContext or token storage mechanism. Also verify Mapbox Geocoding API autocomplete dropdown display - API calls are working but suggestions UI may need styling fixes.
